decision.ad_hoc_probe_artifact: An earlier scratch probe rendered missing source_url as the literal token 'None', which overstated source_url gains.
decision.source_url_probe_result: After missing source URLs are normalized to an empty string, source URL/domain does not solve the five-way task.
decision.why_binary_stage: Any-support detection is a clearer first-stage verifier than five-way support typing.
decision.why_not_trace_id: It improves probe metrics by leaking task identity and should remain diagnostic-only.
decision.why_source_url: Source identity is available at verification time and can encode source quality/context.
